name: Corrective RAG
description: Retrieve, grade the documents, and self-correct: relevant context goes straight to generation; weak retrieval is rewritten or routed to a fallback before answering.

data.label: How it works
data.text: Corrective RAG grades retrieved docs before trusting them. A Guardrail passes relevant context to the generator; on a weak match a Router decides whether to rewrite the query or fall back to a broad search.

data.label: Generator
data.systemPrompt: Answer the question using ONLY the retrieved context. If the context is insufficient, say so.

data.label: Correct
data.routingPrompt: The retrieved context was weak. Decide whether to rewrite the query for a better search or fall back to a broad web search.

data.label: Rewrite Query
data.systemPrompt: Rewrite the user's question to retrieve better documents. Output only the rewritten query.

data.label: Web Fallback
data.description: Broad web search when the local knowledge base is insufficient.

data.label: Watch the grade
data.text: Simulate with an input containing 'context' to take the pass path; anything else fails the Guardrail and exercises the corrective Router.
